vocab.example: I always try to contribute new ideas in team meetings.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi luôn cố gắng đóng góp ý tưởng mới trong các cuộc họp nhóm.

vocab.example: Our team members support each other during busy weeks.
vocab.example_vi: Các thành viên trong nhóm hỗ trợ lẫn nhau trong những tuần bận rộn.

vocab.example: We divide tasks based on each person's strengths.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi phân chia công việc dựa trên thế mạnh của từng người.

vocab.example: I can always rely on my teammates for help.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi luôn có thể dựa vào đồng đội để được giúp đỡ.

vocab.example: Our team spirit helped us finish the project on time.
vocab.example_vi: Tinh thần đồng đội đã giúp chúng tôi hoàn thành dự án đúng hạn.

vocab.example: The whole team pulled together to meet the deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Cả nhóm đã cùng nỗ lực để kịp deadline.

vocab.example: I take accountability for my part of the project.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi chịu trách nhiệm cho phần việc của mình trong dự án.

vocab.example: Our skills complement each other really well in this team.
vocab.example_vi: Kỹ năng của chúng tôi bổ trợ cho nhau rất tốt trong nhóm này.

listening.title: Talking about teamwork in an interview

lines.speaker: Phuong (interviewer)
lines.text: Can you tell me about a time you worked well in a team?

lines.speaker: Hung (candidate)
lines.text: Sure. In my last project, our team had to launch a new feature in two weeks.

lines.speaker: Phuong (interviewer)
lines.text: What was your role in the team?

lines.speaker: Hung (candidate)
lines.text: I helped divide tasks based on each person's strengths so we could work faster.

lines.speaker: Phuong (interviewer)
lines.text: How did the team support each other during that time?

lines.speaker: Hung (candidate)
lines.text: We checked in daily and always tried to support each other when someone was stuck.

lines.speaker: Phuong (interviewer)
lines.text: Did you rely on anyone in particular?

lines.speaker: Hung (candidate)
lines.text: Yes, I relied on our senior developer whenever I had a technical question.

lines.speaker: Phuong (interviewer)
lines.text: What made the team successful, in your view?

lines.speaker: Hung (candidate)
lines.text: I think our team spirit really helped us pull together under pressure.

lines.speaker: Phuong (interviewer)
lines.text: That's great. How do you usually contribute in a team?

lines.speaker: Hung (candidate)
lines.text: I try to contribute by making sure our skills complement each other, and I always take accountability for my part.

questions.q: What was Hung's role in the project?
options: He helped divide tasks based on strengths
He worked alone on the whole feature

questions.q: Who did Hung rely on for technical questions?
What does Hung say helped the team pull together?

shadowing: Our team had to launch a new feature in two weeks.
I helped divide the tasks based on each person's strengths.
We always tried to support each other when someone was stuck.
I always relied on our senior developer for technical questions.
Our team spirit really helped us pull together under pressure.
